text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has an interview scheduled
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking it would be best to have a brief meeting
beforehand, I head into my office only to find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Canned mackerel!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...
Haaah! Canned crab, canned squid, canned curry!
Cannelloni, cannonball, Canada!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is chanting what seems like
some mysterious spell with intense concentration.
All while wearing her signature racewear for some
reason.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hyah! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Haha, sorry about that. You caught me right in
the middle of my special chant for sharpening my
focus.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I have an interview tomorrow, right? I wanted to
be ready, so I looked up all the trendy new
methods on how to concentrate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now then, the next method is... calligraphy! I'm
off to grab some paper and ink!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! "It's a Doggy Dog World Out There"!
Not too shabby, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun-mun... I can feel it now! The power of
concentration is pulsing through my veins!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Two great masters were kind enough to teach me
how to chant and do calligraphy, all for this
moment.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I have to do them proud by acing the interview.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can picture it in my head now. I'll definitely get
questions like "What's your favorite food?" and
"Are you a dog person or a cat person?"
choice_data_list:
...Is wearing your signature racewear also one of
your methods?

...Is wearing your signature racewear also one of
your methods?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes! I thought of this one myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My signature racewear gives me more courage
than anything else. It's precious to me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
After all... it's proof that I was able to take a step
forward despite being so average!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I may just be an ordinary Umamusume who got
into this academy through luck, but when I got
here, I made up my mind to work harder than
anybody else!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Still, no matter how hard I tried, I always felt
like I was the same ordinary girl I'd always been.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And that's when... something extraordinary happened!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This signature racewear is proof that I can run in
G1 races. In other words, it means my
accomplishments are anything but ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Man, I was so thrilled when I first got this outfit! I
called my family right away and sent some selfies
to my friends back home.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Of course, I think getting my signature
racewear was mostly just a stroke of luck, just like
me getting into the academy at all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But being lucky matters. Fuku's always telling me
that, and she's right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm lucky to have made so many friends I can work
hard with. I'm lucky that I get to race against so
many amazing runners who push me to work even
harder.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And above all, I'm lucky to have met you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, glad we're on the same page! But geez, I
can't believe I got us saying stuff like this. How
embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, aaanyway... it feels like my signature
racewear grants me this extraordinary power! So
I'm gonna ace tomorrow's interview!
choice_data_list: Believe in yourself and go get 'em!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Right! I've totally got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I can feel the special power of your words
flowing into me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna tackle my interview tomorrow with this
new power! That's a Machitan guarantee!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Here, let's make it official with a pinky promise! If
I flub up, I'll drink a sea urchin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bursting with vigor and thoroughly focused,
Matikanetannhauser attends her interview in
perfect form.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, are we doing it?! Okay, time for the usual
cheer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna give that interview all I've got! Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Annnd! I'm gonna give every race all I've
got—every single one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Muuun!
